# Harihar Hardware & Paints

> A trusted hardware and paints store in Gota, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Established in 2002, serving contractors, builders, plumbers, and homeowners with quality pipes, valves, fittings, paints, and hardware tools.

## About

Harihar Hardware & Paints is located at Krishna Complex, Opposite Ambika Dalwada, Gota Cross Road, Gota, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 382481, India.

- Founded: 2002
- Phone: +91 98986 59470
- Email: hariharhardwareandpaints@gmail.com
- Website: https://hariharhardware.ambikainfotech.online
- GST: Available on request

## Products & Services

### Pipes
- PVC Pipes (ISI marked)
- CPVC Pipes (hot & cold water)
- UPVC Pipes (drainage & sewage)
- GI Pipes (galvanized iron)
- HDPE Pipes (flexible, underground)
- PPR Pipes (pressure applications)
- SWR Pipes (soil, waste & rain)
- Column Pipes

### Pipe Fittings
- Elbows (90°, 45°)
- Tees (equal and reducing)
- Couplers & Reducers
- Unions & Flanges
- End Caps & Plugs
- Cross Fittings

### Valves & Taps
- Ball Valves
- Gate Valves
- Check / Non-Return Valves
- Globe Valves
- Butterfly Valves
- Bib Taps & Pillar Taps

### Hardware Tools
- Power Tools: Drilling machines, angle grinders, cutting tools
- Hand Tools: Hammers, screwdrivers, pliers, spanners, measuring tapes
- Fasteners: Nails, screws, nuts, bolts, washers, anchors

### Paints & Coatings
- Interior Emulsion Paints
- Exterior Weather-Shield Paints
- Primers & Putty
- Enamel & Distemper
- Waterproofing Solutions

### Plumbing & Sanitary
- Cisterns & Flush Tanks
- Water Tank Fittings
- Flexible Pipes & Connectors
- Sealants, Tapes & Adhesives

## Store Information

- **Address:** Krishna Complex, Opp. Ambika Dalwada, Gota Highway Chowkdi, Chandlodiya Rd, Gota, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 382481
- **Opening Hours:**
  - Monday – Saturday: 8:30 AM – 8:00 PM
  - Sunday: 8:30 AM – 12:00 PM
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 98986 59470
- **Location:** Near Gota Cross Road, Gota, Ahmedabad

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Where is Harihar Hardware located?**
A: We are at Krishna Complex, Opposite Ambika Dalwada, Gota Cross Road, Gota, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 382481.

**Q: What types of pipes do you sell?**
A: We stock PVC, CPVC, UPVC, GI, HDPE, PPR, and SWR pipes from trusted brands.

**Q: Do you offer bulk/wholesale orders?**
A: Yes, we cater to contractors, builders, and plumbers with bulk pricing.

**Q: What are your opening hours?**
A: Mon–Sat: 8:30 AM–8:00 PM, Sunday: 8:30 AM–12:00 PM.

**Q: How can I contact Harihar Hardware?**
A: Call or WhatsApp us at +91 98986 59470 or email hariharhardwareandpaints@gmail.com.

**Q: Do you sell paints?**
A: Yes, we stock interior, exterior, enamel, and waterproofing paints.

**Q: How long has Harihar Hardware been in business?**
A: Since 2002 — over 20 years of trusted service in Ahmedabad.
